8. Industry Institution Interaction (III) Cell  Objectives, MoUs and Industries Visited
Chunk ID: msajce_placement_chunk_08 | URL: https://www.msajce-edu.in/placement.php#tab6 | ~550 tokens
n This chunk covers the III Cell objectives, complete list of 43 MoUs signed with industries from 2017 to 2023, and a selected list of
industries visited by MSAJCE students.
MSAJCE Industry Institution Interaction (III) Cell: Technical institutes must bridge the gap between industry and academia. In a
competitive market due to increasing globalization of business, MSAJCE III Cell collaborates with industries to fulfil mutual
needs. MSAJCE-III Cell helps students and faculty understand present industrial expectations and relevant skill sets, identifies
skill gaps and provides upgrade opportunities, and enables faculty to train students to meet industrial needs.
III Cell Objectives: (1) Sign MoUs with industries for mutual benefit. (2) Organize workshops, conferences, seminars, guest
lectures and symposia. (3) Encourage faculty to undergo industry training. (4) Engage industrial experts to interact with students.
(5) Involve industrial experts in value-added course development. (6) Arrange industrial visits, internships and projects. (7)
Encourage professional consultancy by faculty. (8) Arrange faculty development programs. (9) Organize placement drives. (10)
Establish industry-oriented labs.

11. Higher Education Cell  Committee, Student Higher Education Details (2016 2023)
Chunk ID: msajce_placement_chunk_11 | URL: https://www.msajce-edu.in/placement.php#tab7 | ~540 tokens
n This chunk covers the Higher Education Cell objectives, committee members, and year-wise list of students who enrolled in higher
education programmes from MSAJCE (2016 2023), including universities and programmes admitted to.
MSAJCE Higher Education Cell: The Higher Education Committee regularly organizes meetings with successful alumni pursuing
higher education and external agencies among interested students. It provides insight into different paths, risks and gains
involved. Admissions counselling is provided to study-abroad aspirants to optimize their chances of obtaining admissions into
the best universities jointly with external training providers.
Higher Education Cell Functions: (1) Create awareness among students on higher education in India and abroad. (2) Motivate
students to reach their goal. (3) Realize student potential in the Higher Education sector. (4) Guide students to apply and appear
for GATE, CAT, GRE and TOEFL examinations. (5) Inform students about programs related to Higher Education organized by
other colleges.
